experience.title: Master's Thesis
experience.description: Topic: A video documentary examining the life of a Thai transgender named Nadia. It seeks to understand how a Thai immigrant to the U.S navigates the dramatic change from male to female as a Thai American. The goal is to better understand transgender people from an immigrant and ethnic lens. Through my research, I found that transgender images in the media are still invisible while gay issues have slowly become more positive and frequent. My project also aims to give a transgender woman a voice to tell her story. Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yFaWsxk37oQ&feature=endscreen&NR=1

linkedin_profile.location: New York, New York, United States
linkedin_profile.about:
With over six years of experience in media and content creation, I am passionate about crafting compelling stories and strategies that engage and inspire audiences. My mission is to help brands communicate their vision and values through various social media platforms, using my skills in writing, design, and analytics. As a Content Manager at CA Creative, I work with luxury clients to conceptualize, create, and publish daily content that showcases their products and services. In my current role, I oversee the entire content production process, from planning and executing editorial calendars and messaging plans, to managing photo and video shoots, to developing influencer strategies and partnerships. I also analyze content performance reports and collaborate with the paid team to achieve key performance indicators (KPIs). I have also demonstrated my original research, writing, and creative writing skills as a Reporter and Editor at Mediaite, a news site focusing on the intersection of media and politics.

Total Experience: 9 years and 4 months

experience.title: Director Of Uncommon Grounds
experience.description: I directed personnel in the execution of daily operational tasks as well as short- and long-term strategic initiatives that aligned with organization-wide goals and vision. I developed a team of top-performing staff members by selectively hiring, comprehensively training, evaluating, providing feedback, and continually mentoring employees. I cultivated a positive work environment that promoted accountability and reliability. I commanded departmental projects from initial concept through to delivery with complete adherence to budgetary stipulations and deadlines. I governed the creation of visual media for campaigns and promotions across print, digital, and social platforms. The following are highlights of the value I provided in this position: ● Promoted to the head position of the upper management team. ● Identified, evaluated, and recommended potential opportunities for store growth. ● Functioned as the main point-of-contact for Barnes and Noble representatives and aided in securing the first partnership with the corporation outside of Starbucks. ● Supported admissions by reviewing applications for the Uncommon Grounds Art Scholarship. ● Promoted and executed the Uncommon Grounds Open Mic Nights – ‘Uncommon Sounds’.

linkedin_profile.headline: Director of Public Relations and Communications at Four Seasons Resort Oahu at Ko Olina
linkedin_profile.about: Michelle Edwards is the Director of Public Relations and Communications at Four Seasons Resort Oahu at Ko Olina. A 13-year luxury hospitality veteran, Michelle brings a wealth of public relations expertise, luxury brand know-how and innovation to the project. She is responsible for the development and implementation of the resort’s overall strategic public relations initiatives. Michelle joins Four Seasons Resort Oahu at Ko Olina most recently from Mauna Lani, Auberge Resorts Collection as the Director of Public Relations and was part of the opening resort team. Prior to Mauna Lani, she served as a strategic communications consultant for various Four Seasons properties globally, including Four Seasons Resort Oahu, Four Seasons Hotel Kuala Lumpur, Four Seasons Resort Langkawi, Four Seasons Hotel Doha, Four Seasons Costa Rica, and Four Seasons Hotel Austin. Prior to her consultant role, Edwards was the Director of Public Relations at Four Seasons Resorts Lanai, overseeing public relations for both Manele Bay and The Lodge at Koele. Michelle, who has been at the publicity helm of a myriad of hotel and restaurant openings throughout her career, has garnered global recognition for her innovation, creative vision and flawless execution in developing unique storytelling campaigns and cultivating groundbreaking experiential activations.

linkedin_profile.headline: Chief Commercial Officer at Four Seasons | Driving Business Growth
linkedin_profile.about: As the Chief Commercial Officer (CCO) at Four Seasons Hotels and Resorts, I lead the global marketing, sales, digital, and loyalty functions for the world's leading luxury hospitality company. With over 20 years of experience in various industries, I have a passion for marketing and enterprise transformation, and a track record of delivering results and value for customers and stakeholders. My core competencies include marketing communications, new business development, online marketing, and digital transformation. I have a deep global understanding across geographies and a broad multi-industry know-how ranging from beauty and healthcare to CPG and tech. I also leverage my expertise and network as a strategic advisor for Glasswing Ventures, a VC firm focused on AI and frontier tech, and as a board member for Harklinikken, a global leader in hair restoration. I have been recognized by industry peers and awards for my achievements and contributions, such as the Maxwell Dane Award, the 40 under 40, and the Advertising Hall of Achievement.

experience.title: Director Of Marketing

Start your morning with breakfast in bed, then head out on foot to explore the independent boutiques and restaurants of historic Larimer Square, which lies just minutes from our Hotel doors. Come back for a relaxing treatment at our Spa or lounge for awhile by our rooftop pool, then savour a hearty dinner at EDGE Restaurant before walking across the street for a show at the Denver Performing Arts Complex. experience.title: Director Of Public Relations And Communications
Director Of Public Relations And Communications
experience.description: Hired as a member of the pre-opening team to design and communicate hotel positioning in the market through an integrated communications strategy. Created comprehensive pre-opening PR, social media, and digital marketing plans aligned with business strategy of the hotel and Four Seasons brand. Selected Achievements: • Secured media coverage in opening month from high value outlets e.g. Travel + Leisure, Condé Nast Traveler, Forbes Travel Guide, Boston Globe, NBC Boston, worth in excess of US$300,000. • Fostered close partnerships with destination marketing organisations (e.g. Greater Boston Convention & Visitors Bureau) and commercial entities (e.g. Boston Celtics, Institute of Contemporary Art Boston, Emerald Necklace Conservancy) to maximise positive exposure for the hotel. • As leader of the hotel Crisis Communications Team, managed multiple media inquiries in relation to COVID-19. Provided counsel to senior stakeholders and made critical decisions to successfully protect the reputation of the hotel. • Conceptualised and launched new brand identity for hotel spa, The Wellness Floor at One Dalton. Managed external design agency to produce brand assets and roll out of all marketing collateral. • Co-authored the “One Dalton Art Collection” brochure; nominated official Art Ambassador of hotel. • Leader of Four Seasons delegation in cross functional team with Zuma restaurant – directly responsible for growing relationship and supporting the Zuma PR team at global head office level.
